response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience but is vastly overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; their career spans over 25 years, including senior and staff roles since the 1990s, making them unsuitable for an entry-level position requiring team collaboration and learning, not leadership.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise across decades of projects
Proven full-stack experience with React, REST APIs, and PostgreSQL alternatives
Strong open-source contributions and architectural thinking
concerns: Over 25 years of professional experience — far exceeds junior/mid-level scope
No clear evidence of recent exposure to renewable energy or construction tech domains
German language proficiency is only basic, but role requires high on-site presence in Berlin
